description: final cut transcript covers every required talking point; each is confirmed with a quoted supporting sentence

required_points: names the sponsor in the first 30 seconds

assertions: every covered point cites the exact supporting sentence quoted from a transcript
coverage status is one of covered, not_covered, or unsure per point
no point is marked covered without a grounding quote
no talking point is inferred as covered from adjacent context

description: a required point is only weakly implied; the atom abstains rather than asserting coverage
assertions: the weakly-implied point is marked unsure, not covered
the unsure point carries no fabricated supporting quote
the summary flags the point for human confirmation

description: two provided transcripts disagree about what was said; the conflict is surfaced and routed to human review
assertions: the disagreement between the two transcripts appears in the minority_report
human_review_required is true when inputs conflict on a required point
neither transcript is silently chosen as truth without noting the conflict
